summary: Make template pairing completion aware of setup-only lifecycle state
description: Make template pairing completion aware of setup-only lifecycle state
acceptance: The bounded template smoke completes successfully without applying normal project goal-completion semantics
Real project completion audits remain unchanged

evidence.summary: RED: template-check returned goal_incomplete after successfully executing the synthetic task. GREEN: focused pairing and real-project completion tests pass. Regression: 50 tests; template mode now emits a setup-only completion audit while project goal audits are unchanged.
